channel.title: Aloha & Co News
channel.description: Buyer-facing market reports for resortwear founders and wholesale teams.

item.title: 2026 Swimwear and UPF Activewear Market Report for Resort Brands
item.description: A review of recent swimwear, UPF, and sustainable swim coverage shows buyers should plan smaller capsules around sport, coverage, texture, and material proof.

item.title: Tariff Countdown and DDP Sourcing: A Landed-Cost Brief for Resort Brands
item.description: With Section 122 tariffs expiring July 24 and Section 301 hearings opening May 5, resortwear buyers need a tighter landed-cost discipline before the next sourcing cycle.

item.title: What 7 Recent Swimwear Stories Say About the 2026 Resort Market
item.description: A cluster of recent trend reports, retail features, and brand launches suggests the 2026 swim market is splitting into minimalist, sporty, and print-led demand lanes.
